name: German Style Barbecued Spareribs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, microwave butter for 30 seconds.
2. Add onion, brown sugar, pepper, salt, mustard, and catsup to the bowl.
3. Microwave, uncovered, for 3 minutes.
4. In a 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, combine sauerkraut, apple, and caraway seeds.
5. Dip each sparerib into sauce and place on top of sauerkraut. Pour remaining barbecue sauce over the top.
6. Cover and microwave for 15 to 18 minutes. Ensure pork reaches well-done status.
